_README: Noisy features/measurements to EXCLUDE from training. train_compare.py drops
these before fitting, so you can prune inverted/uninformative signals without
re-extracting. Use the 'CANDIDATES (grade-inverted / weak)' report printed by
train_compare.py to decide what to add here. Names are exact column names:
Prefixes are allowed: an entry ending in '.*' or '*' drops every matching column
